comment.body: VIX and IV are different. vix used a weighted average of a bunch of different instruments related to sp500. The IV is worked out from price SPY calls and puts. The VIX is more of a fudge. From what i  understand

comment.body: You are better off thinking VIX as a liquidity gauge more than anything due to how it is calculated. The market still functions in that window but a lot of the longer term positioning also moved closer to 0DTEs and weeklies and they are not included and VIX calculations. In short, no VIX is not gauging IV
